div.p: Deepened modules, eliminated split brains, data-driven icons

g.text: Eliminated split brains: unified feedbackStyleSet replaces duplicate alertStyleSet/toastStyleSet
Deepened icons: path-data map + shared SVG renderer (minus 100 lines)
Deepened forms: shared error/aria helpers (minus 30 lines duplication)
Type safety: AvatarStatus enum, TrendDirection enum (impossible states unrepresentable)
Data-driven: all enum-to-class lookups via MapEnum or maps, no switch statements
BaseProps struct (ID, Class, Attrs, AriaLabel, Nonce)
Class() MergeAttrs() Ternary[T]() Ptr[T]() MapEnum[T]() BoolString()
